tagline: The unified runs list is in Public Preview.
what_it_does: The unified runs list is in Public Preview. Monitor both job and pipeline runs in a single unified list. Monitor Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines in the Databricks user interface to track update progress, alert on pipeline events, and view streaming source metrics.
why_it_matters: The right pane shows pipeline details at the top, including the pipeline ID, compute cost, product edition, and channel.
plain_summary: The unified runs list is in Public Preview. Monitor both job and pipeline runs in a single unified list.
key_takeaway: The unified runs list is in Public Preview.
